title: Lab: Refactor an Availability Table into Semantic Tokens
summary: Lab: Refactor an Availability Table into Semantic Tokens retrieves prior skills in an original independent table token cascade and failure repair scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css custom property definition, css custom property cascade, css custom property fallbacks, css design token system, css property registration in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real independent table token cascade and failure repair artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Independent table token cascade and failure repair case 1: treat --manual-gap and --Manual-gap as the same variable because CSS property names ignore case.

Independent table token cascade and failure repair case 1: trace the winning custom-property declaration through cascade and inheritance, then validate the resolved token stream in the consuming property.
Independent table token cascade and failure repair case 1: assume defining --space: wide is valid because custom properties accept any tokens in every consumer.

options.text: Independent table token cascade and failure repair case 3: a custom property declared on root cannot be overridden safely inside a component.
Independent table token cascade and failure repair case 3: scope defaults broadly, override semantic inputs on the smallest intended subtree, and inspect the value at the consumer element.
Independent table token cascade and failure repair case 3: use important on root so local components cannot accidentally customize their own inputs.

options.text: Independent table token cascade and failure repair case 5: a var fallback repairs every syntactically invalid resolved value.
Independent table token cascade and failure repair case 5: use nested fallbacks for genuinely missing tokens, then separately test present-but-invalid values in the consuming property.
Independent table token cascade and failure repair case 5: assume a fallback after a comma cannot itself contain commas or another var function.
